text: Context: Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981 Question: What is the penalty for air pollution under the Air Act 1981? Answer: Under Section 37, whoever fails to comply with the provisions of section 21 or section 22 shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than one year and six months. --- Context: Section 2(a) of the Air Act 1981 Question: What is the definition of air pollutant? Answer: Any solid, liquid or gaseous substance present in the atmosphere in such concentration as may be or tend to be injurious to human beings, other living creatures or plants.
